result: Summary written and committed (349ed58). All four upstream inputs were present (high confidence). The synthesis surfaces four notable cross-references: ChunkHound produces an MCP server but has no MCP config for its own dev process; a 170K-line multi-domain codebase runs with zero ADRs/specs/planning; all work-docs and AI tooling exist only to produce this ceremony's outputs; and user docs are externalized to chunkhound.github.io.

structured_output.result: Wrote `_ceremony_executions/OBR/20-REPO-ANALYSIS-01/repository-structure-analysis-summary.yaml` ΓÇö cross-reference synthesis over all four upstream repo-analysis outputs (code, conceptual-docs, work-docs, ai-process-inventory). All inputs present; confidence=high. Key cross-references: (1) ChunkHound is MCP-producing but its dev process has zero MCP config; (2) a 170K-line multi-domain codebase operates with no ADRs/specs/planning docs; (3) all work-docs and AI-process tooling trace to the same in-progress OBR ceremony; (4) user docs are externalized to chunkhound.github.io. Tags: active-development, single-module, published-library, mcp-server, ai-first-product, minimal-ai-dev-tooling, docs-externalized, no-formal-backlog. Committed as 349ed58.

assumptions.assumption: module_count=1 reflects top-level modules[] entries only, not submodules[].
assumptions.impact: Downstream may see a single-module tag despite 7 submodules; matches upstream repository_type='single-module'.

assumptions.assumption: claude_md_file_count=2 includes AGENTS.md per upstream's CLAUDE.md-equivalent cataloging.
assumptions.impact: Slight inflation vs. literal CLAUDE.md count, but matches upstream notes.
assumptions.evidence_from_prompt: AGENTS.md is catalogued as a second CLAUDE.md-equivalent entry

assumptions.assumption: work_docs_signals.coverage.has_epics/has_implementation_logs=false since upstream uses a different flag set.
assumptions.impact: Low ΓÇö no epics/implementation logs exist under any interpretation.

uncertainty_areas: Whether modules_by_status should include submodules (8 alpha) or only top-level modules (1 alpha) ΓÇö chose top-level to match module_count.
evidence_quotes: No ADR directory or Architecture Decision Record convention in use.
